transcript: Speaker A: ಏನು ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: ಐ ಮೆಣಸಿನಕಾಯಿ grinding. [I chilli grinding.] Speaker A: ಹಹಹ... "ಮೆಣಸಿನಕಾಯಿ grinding" ಅಲ್ಲ... "I am grinding chillies" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Hahaha... Not "chilli grinding"... You should say "I am grinding chillies".] Speaker B: ನನಗೆ English ಸರಿಯಾಗಿ ಬರಲ್ಲ. [I don't know English properly.] Speaker A: ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ! ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ easy ಆಗಿ English ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದು. [No problem! If you practice a little every day, you can speak English easily.] Speaker B: ನಾನು ಮನೆ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ English ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದಾ? [Can I learn English while doing housework?] Speaker A: ಖಂಡಿತ! ಅಡುಗೆ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ, ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ, ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ 15 min practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. [Of course! While cooking, while working, practicing 15 minutes a day is enough.] Speaker B: ಆದರೆ fees ಕಟ್ಟೋಕೆ ನನ್ನ ಬಳಿ ದುಡ್ಡೇ ಇಲ್ಲ. [But I don't have money to pay fees.] Speaker A: ಚಿಂತೆ ಬೇಡ. ನೀವು ಕೇವಲ 1 Rupee ಇಂದ start ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 Crores+ people MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ English ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [Don't worry. You can start with just 1 Rupee. That's why 1 Crore+ people have learned English with me on MySivi.] Speaker B: Super... ನಾನು ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Super... How do I join?] Speaker A: ಕೆಳಗಿರುವ install button ಒತ್ತಿ, MySivi app install ಮಾಡಿ, ನಿಮ್ಮ English practice ಇಂದೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, and start your English practice today.] Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.

summary: An AI robot corrects a woman's English grammar while she grinds chillies. The AI explains that users can learn English for just 1 Rupee by practicing 15 minutes daily during chores. The ad concludes with a call to install the MySivi app.
